description: Android is Google’s operating system and application platform for phones, tablets, wearables, TVs, cars, and other devices. The android.com/developer.android.com property provides documentation, SDK/tooling information, and developer resources for building Android apps.
summary: android.com exposes Android developer documentation and a published Android CLI surface; no public HTTP, GraphQL, or MCP integration endpoint on android.com was found from the available developer pages.
